question: The chart shows browser usage share by product (percent). Which statement is correct according to the chart data?

options.A: Safari has the smallest market share.
options.B: Edge has the largest market share among the browsers shown.
options.C: Chrome has the largest market share among the browsers shown.
options.D: Others account for more than 20% of the total.

explanation: From the labels, Edge has the highest share (66%). The bars' heights are not proportional to the percentages (they use a separate 'height' value), which can mislead viewers into thinking Edge is largest when relying on visual comparison.
